$$
108 \cdot \frac{x}{18} = 108 \cdot \frac{45 - x}{12}
$$

Simplify both sides:

- Left side: $ \frac{108}{18}x = 6x $
- Right side: $ \frac{108}{12}(45 - x) = 9(45 - x) $

$$
6x = 9(45 - x)

$$
6x = 405 - 9x
$$

Add $ 9x $ to both sides:

$$
15x = 405
$$

Divide both sides by 15:

$$

$$
